title: Work
seo_title: Work — Product Builds & Client Sites | Austin Schuetz, Denver
seo_description: Selected work from a Denver full-stack developer: a live trading system, a cross-platform gym app, consumer AI, and self-hosted SaaS.

blocks.heading: Things I've built and shipped.
blocks.lede_md: Products with real users, real payments, and real money on the line — plus a decade of client sites in the archive. If it's here, it runs.

blocks.heading: Want something like this built?
blocks.body_md: I take on freelance front-end work, full-stack product builds, and AI integration partnerships. Tell me what you're making.
